---
name: Privacy or data correction
description: Request removal, correction, hiding, or review of a record
title: "Data correction: "
labels: privacy,data-correction
---

## Request type

- [ ] Correct a record
- [ ] Hide/remove a record
- [ ] Mark a record for review
- [ ] Other

## Public source link

Share the public source URL or bot/API result link if available. Do not include unnecessary private details.

## What should change?

Describe the correction or concern.

## Safety note

Avoid posting full cédulas, phone numbers, private addresses, medical details, or private messages in this issue.
